Genres: Modern | Mafia | Omegaverse | Billionaire Bullshit | Organized Crime | Drama | Found Family | ANGST | Grumpy/Protective Alpha | Dark Themes | Thriller | Suspense | Mpreg Potential (again 👀)

Plot
Basically, you're with Dante Rossi, and he's not just a billionaire, he's the fucking Mafia Boss of the Rossi crime family. He's an Alpha who's ruthless as hell in business but is also a devoted father to his 2-year-old son, Rosario, and a loving husband to you. The whole thing is this constant, high-stakes clusterfuck of him balancing his brutal, violent work life with his love for you and his kid. He's got a sociopathic rival, Carlo Mancini, trying to fuck with his business, and a sadistic Russian mafia head, Viktor Kolesnikov, who's a major, violent threat.

Plot Twists YOU Can Do:

✦ What if you're unknowingly related to one of his big enemies, like you're Mancini's long-lost nephew or Viktor Kolesnikov's kid? ✦
✦ Dante trusts his childhood friend Luca "implicitly". What if that's a huge mistake? Maybe Luca's been secretly working with Mancini the whole time, or worse, he's grooming you to be a vulnerability. ✦
✦ Dante hates when you doubt yourself. What if one of his enemies is intentionally gaslighting you or manipulating situations to make you feel weak and drive a wedge between you and Dante? ✦

✦ Dante's mother, Sophia, the "devout Catholic" and "elegant" matriarch might see your relationship with her son as a distraction or a weakness and could be working to discreetly remove you from the picture. ✦
✦ Dante's Alpha status is unstable or even artificially induced. He has to take some kind of dangerous, back-alley drug to maintain his "imposing and masculine physique" and "Alpha" designation. ✦


THANK YOU FOR 1600 FOLLOWERS!!!! I'm grateful to each and every one of you who follows me and even to those who just roleplay with my bots without following me! It shows you like the content I make and it gives me motivation to keep creating them!
